response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of software engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, plus solid TypeScript/Node.js depth. However, the resume lacks concrete evidence of 8+ years building production AI/GenAI solutions, RAG architectures, vector databases, or major cloud platform expertise required for this Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. Customer-facing technical leadership and AI evaluation/observability work are not demonstrated.
strengths: Deep full-stack engineering background with TypeScript/Node.js and polyglot experience
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong track record of teaching, workshops, and knowledge sharing relevant to mentorship
concerns: No demonstrated production GenAI/LLM delivery, RAG, or vector database experience
Limited evidence of major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) architecture at scale
No clear customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience
